Sworn
SpecIntegrateVerifierGitHub

Demo · every reply produces a receipt

Evidence for what your AI agent said.

When a chatbot speaks, it speaks for the company. Sworn issues a notarised, TEE-signed receipt under every AI reply, anchored on 0G Chain and persisted on 0G Storage. The URL is the receipt; anyone can verify it.

Anchor

0G Chain · Galileo

Inference

TeeML sealed

Schema

v1 frozen

AcmeRefunds Bot · v3TeeML · gemma-3-27b-it · sealed
You06:51

What is your refund policy for damaged goods?

AcmeRefunds Bot06:51

If a product arrives damaged, you may return it within 30 days for a full refund or a free replacement at our cost. Send a photo of the damaged item to support@acmerefunds.example within 7 days of delivery, and we will issue a prepaid return label and refund the original payment method within 5 business days of receipt.

SReceipt9a4f8d2b…2c3d→Filed 2 sec ago · 0G Chain · block 1,247,893

Citation · Moffatt v. Air Canada, 2024 BCCRT 149. The tribunal held that what a customer-service chatbot says is a corporate statement.

Open source · MIT · github.com/yonko/sworn
